none.justification: Despite the incorrect stated count of 83 and the extra inclusion of `.name`/`.desc`, the actual list contains the full set of 96 function-pointer field/function pairs through the end of the struct literal, including conditional TDLS/Android/Mesh and final bridge/ACS/band entries.

ccodegraph.justification: Matches the GT exactly in substance: 96 function-pointer fields, correct function names, ordered through the full struct literal, with conditional blocks correctly identified and `.name`/`.desc` excluded from the count.

lsp.justification: Matches the GT: it lists all 96 function-pointer assignments with correct names through the final `set_prob_oper_freq` entry, and separately notes the two non-function string fields without counting them.
